prompt: Create an ultra high-end conceptual chest-up studio portrait of a mysterious male public figure standing front-facing behind a tall transparent vertical refractive glass panel. The subject wears a charcoal-gray tailored blazer over a plain black crew-neck shirt, with short dark hair visible above an intentionally anonymizing opaque square mask covering the central face. The composition is centered and symmetrical, cropped from the upper thighs to just above the head, with the shoulders broad and still. Use a deep cinematic blue studio background with a subtle gradient from dark navy on the left to cooler luminous blue on the right. The glass panel should create vertical sliced distortions, faint duplicate ghost silhouettes offset to both sides, and thin vertical refraction lines running from top to bottom. Add exactly two prominent horizontal prism light streaks: one crossing the face area at eye level in cyan, blue, orange, and white, and one crossing the lower chest area in cyan and orange; include soft motion blur and spectral dispersion around the streaks. Lighting should be dramatic and editorial, with cool rim light, glossy reflections, high contrast, and a premium conceptual photography look. Make the portrait sharp in the clothing and body silhouette but distorted through the glass, with no text, no logos, and no extra objects.
